meaning: n.(肯尼亚和东非其他一些地方的)零售商店
examples: The six men, all in their 20s, filed into the courtroom: Elvir Duka, who goes by the name Elvis, thumped his chest and waved.
Tony Taylor and then Dilly Duka then scored in the second-half before Banana Yaya scored from the penalty spot to pull a goal back for Cameroon.
